mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_file (user_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, status, content, error_message, upload_time, processed_time, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{content}, #{errorMessage}, #{uploadTime}, #{processedTime}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, status, content, error_message, upload_time, processed_time, updated_at FROM knowledge_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, status, content, error_message, upload_time, processed_time, updated_at FROM knowledge_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, status, content, error_message, upload_time, processed_time, updated_at FROM knowledge_file WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY upload_time ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_file WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, status, content, error_message, upload_time, processed_time, updated_at FROM knowledge_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'READY' AND (file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 50
